/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/app.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/src/IndexBuffer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/src/Renderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/src/Shader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/src/Texture.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/src/TileSet.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/src/VertexArray.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/src/VertexBuffer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/src/VertexBufferLayout.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/src/Wfc.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/src/vendor/imgui/imgui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/src/vendor/imgui/imgui_draw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/src/vendor/imgui/imgui_tables.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/src/vendor/imgui/imgui_widgets.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/src/vendor/imgui/imgui_impl_glfw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/src/vendor/imgui/imgui_impl_opengl3.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/src/vendor/stb_img/stb_image.cpp.o -o app  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libglfw.so.3.3 /root/.local/lib/libGLEW.a -ldl -lpthread -lX11 -lXrandr -lXi /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so
